daily_summary.headline: Exciting Space Events and Aurora Opportunities

top_events.title: Starship Flight 12
top_events.description: Maiden flight of Starship V3, testing new technologies for future Mars missions.
top_events.action: Watch live for groundbreaking technology tests.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: G1 geomagnetic storm expected, visible to 60° latitude.
top_events.action: Check skies for aurora activity if you're at high latitudes.

top_events.title: Vega-C SMILE Mission
top_events.description: Launch of the SMILE mission to study Earth's magnetosphere.
top_events.action: Follow the mission for insights into Earth's space environment.

alerts.title: Starship Flight 12 - Maiden Flight
alerts.message: The maiden flight of Starship V3 is scheduled for May 19, 2026. This test flight will demonstrate new technologies crucial for future Mars missions.
alerts.action_required: Watch live for groundbreaking technology tests.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
